claim: Enterprise agentic projects fail primarily due to infrastructure/governance constraints, not technology; approval bottlenecks limit deployment speed
actionable: Prioritize automating human approval workflows into executable code rather than fixing code quality; this is the actual blocker in enterprises
source_title: Most Enterprise Agentic Projects Are Doomed, Here's Why — Jess Grogan-Avignon & Jack Wang, Accenture

claim: Finance should fund AI projects as a portfolio of exploratory bets rather than demanding committed ROI from each project, like VCs do
actionable: Frame agentic AI initiatives to finance using portfolio/VC language (risk, exploration cost, power-law returns) rather than traditional project ROI
source_title: Most Enterprise Agentic Projects Are Doomed, Here's Why — Jess Grogan-Avignon & Jack Wang, Accenture

claim: Agentic delivery requires hypothesis-driven iteration and statistical confidence measurement, not milestone-based planning like traditional software
actionable: Reshape agentic delivery programs around small build-evaluate-iterate loops with evidence gates, not traditional PI planning and milestones
source_title: Most Enterprise Agentic Projects Are Doomed, Here's Why — Jess Grogan-Avignon & Jack Wang, Accenture

claim: Progressive autonomy (shadow > advisory > controlled > full) gated by outcome evidence builds stakeholder trust faster than feature-based rollout
actionable: Deploy agents through exposure ladder stages gated by behavioral confidence, not project completion; use each stage to build evidence for next
source_title: Most Enterprise Agentic Projects Are Doomed, Here's Why — Jess Grogan-Avignon & Jack Wang, Accenture

claim: Competitive moat in AI comes from continuous feedback loops on real customer signals, not static data; iterate product daily based on behavior
actionable: Design agentic products to log every user signal; make daily iteration on agent behavior your primary competitive advantage
source_title: Most Enterprise Agentic Projects Are Doomed, Here's Why — Jess Grogan-Avignon & Jack Wang, Accenture
